name: Will U
description: WillU is a web-based platform for creating and sharing digital postcards through https://willu.app . Users can select a design template, write a personalized message, and generate a unique shareable link after creating an account. The platform focuses on simplifying the process of designing and distributing short-form digital messages in a structured and accessible format. WillU operates through a browser interface and supports link-based sharing across messaging applications and social networks.
